metadata.title: Nail Seitai AI Diagnosis | Check Your Nail Health with AI
metadata.description: Check your nail health with Nail Seitai and AI diagnosis. Nail care information available in Japanese, English, and Arabic.

hero.title: Support Health with Nail Seitai
hero.subtitle: Check nail condition with AI diagnosis

health.title: Importance of Healthy Nails
health.description: Nails are called the 'barometer of health,' reflecting your body's condition. Noticing changes in color, shape, and thickness leads to early health management.

merit.title: Benefits of Nail Seitai
merit.description: By adjusting the shape and growth direction of nails, it improves blood circulation in fingertips and balances the entire body. Effective for preventing ingrown and deformed nails.

sports.title: Sports Performance Enhancement
sports.description: Proper nail care directly affects an athlete's grip and stability. Optimize your performance with nail seitai tailored to your sport.

step1.title: Simple 3 Steps
step1.description: Just take a photo of your nails and upload it. No registration required — start your diagnosis instantly.

step2.title: Instant Results
step2.description: Cutting-edge AI analyzes your nail condition instantly. Get a health score and an easy-to-understand report.

step3.title: Improvement Advice
step3.description: Receive specific improvement advice based on your results. From daily care tips to guidance on consulting specialists.

items.name: Misaki T.
items.comment: I was worried about my nail condition, but the AI diagnosis gave me specific advice and peace of mind. I check monthly now.

items.name: Kenta S.
items.comment: Thanks to nail seitai, my nail problems during running have drastically decreased. I feel my performance has improved too.

items.name: Akari Y.
items.comment: I use the AI diagnosis for client consultations. Having objective data makes explanations much easier.

cta.title: Try AI Diagnosis Now
cta.description: Simply upload a photo of your nails, and our AI will analyze your nail health.
